lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows wear and staining on the upholstery. Mechanical systems are currently operational.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It suffers from significant rust on the undercarriage and body panels, and the engine requires an immediate overhaul as it consumes oil and smokes upon startup. The interior shows heavy wear with multiple tears in the seats and several non-functional electrical components. This car is best suited for a dedicated restoration project or as a donor vehicle for parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and regular use. The exterior paint has several noticeable scratches, minor door dings, and some fading on the roof and hood. Inside, the upholstery exhibits some wear and minor staining, and there are a few small cracks on the dashboard. While it remains a reliable driver, the car would benefit from a thorough detailing and some minor cosmetic attention. It is a functional, budget-friendly option for someone looking for a dependable vehicle that doesn't need to be perfect.

Discover a reliable companion that's ready for its next chapter! This vehicle is in fair condition, showing some honest character through typical wear and tear from its journey so far. It remains a solid, dependable choice for anyone looking for a practical ride with plenty of road ahead. Perfect for someone who appreciates a car that’s been well-used and is still going strong!

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no dents. The interior is clean with light wear on the seats. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are in good working order.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and consistent maintenance. This well-preserved unit offers a refined driving experience, featuring a clean interior and a robust powertrain that has been thoroughly vetted by our senior technicians. It serves as an ideal selection for the professional seeking a dependable, high-value asset without compromising on prestige or performance. This vehicle stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains prepared for immediate service.

Hey everyone! I'm selling my awesome car and it's looking for a brand new adventure! It’s in really wonderful shape, runs like a dream, and has been super well-maintained. It's perfect for anyone who wants a dependable, stylish ride that's ready to hit the road right now. You’re going to love how it handles—come check it out!
This E46 M3 chassis is powered by the high-revving S54 inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a factory-rated 8
Used car in good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable, well-cared-for car that performs beautifully on the road. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, superficial imperfections one would expect from light, respectful use. Inside, the interior is exceptionally clean and has been kept smoke-free; the upholstery is firm and free of tears, while all dashboard components and power features—including the infotainment system and dual-zone climate control—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in robust health. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection, fresh synthetic oil, and a new battery installed last month. The engine pulls smoothly with no hesitation, and the transmission provides crisp, effortless shifts. With a documented service history and tires that still have plenty of tread, this car is turn-key ready for its next owner. We invite any inspection to confirm its solid condition.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior aesthetic, it offers a balanced combination of performance and comfort. Our thorough multi-point inspection ensures that this automobile meets rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and roadworthiness. An ideal selection for those seeking reliable quality and sophisticated engineering at a competitive market valuation.

This meticulously maintained executive vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating a consistent history of professional servicing, the automobile exhibits reliable mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. It offers a sophisticated driving experience that balances proven performance with long-term value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car for me. It’s in solid shape, runs like a dream, and has clearly been well-loved. It’s perfect for someone who wants a reliable, quality vehicle that's ready for its next big adventure! I’m really excited for it to find a new home where it'll be appreciated.

Offering a mechanically sound performance coupe featuring a high-revving, naturally aspirated longitudinal engine paired with a short-throw six-speed manual transmission. This vehicle maintains exceptional lateral grip thanks to its factory-tuned double-wishbone front suspension and a torque-sensing limited-slip differential. The braking system utilizes four-piston fixed calipers with ventilated rotors, showing minimal fade and excellent pedal modulation. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive fluid flush and an inspection of the variable valve timing actuators. While exhibiting minor cosmetic patina consistent with a well-loved driver’s car, the structural rigidity and powertrain synchronization remain top-tier for the enthusiast seeking visceral feedback and cornering precision.
Well-maintained. Runs smooth. Clean interior. Minor exterior scuffs. Reliable daily driver. Price firm.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-maintained and reliable daily driver. The exterior finish retains a high gloss, showing only minor cosmetic wear consistent with responsible use. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, non-smoker cabin with well-preserved seating, a clean headliner, and fully operational electronics. Mechanically, the car is in excellent working order; it has been serviced religiously according to the manufacturer's schedule, with recent updates to the braking system and a fresh set of all-season tires. The engine runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts seamlessly, providing a confident and comfortable ride on both city streets and highways. Complete with a comprehensive service history and all original manuals, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with absolute peace of mind.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic excellence, this unit offers a seamless blend of performance and sophisticated styling. A testament to responsible ownership, it remains in robust condition and is prepared for immediate delivery to its next proprietor.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both engineering excellence and sustained value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and consistent performance. With a well-preserved interior and a refined exterior profile, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional seeking a balance of luxury and dependability.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my reliable ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a dependable car without the brand-new price tag. It runs beautifully and is ready to hit the road with you today. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it feels!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 naturally aspirated 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through its individual throttle bodies. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive Vanos overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring the chassis handles the high-revving output without compromise. Equipped with a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential, the drivetrain remains tight with crisp gear engagement. The suspension retains its communicative geometry, though minor compliance in the bushings reflects its honest mileage. A mechanically sound, driver-focused example optimized for the apex.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Reliable performance.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a dependable, high-quality daily driver. Under the hood, the engine performs flawlessly with smooth acceleration and consistent power delivery, backed by a comprehensive service history. I have strictly adhered to all scheduled maintenance, recently completing a full synthetic oil change and a multi-point inspection. The exterior presents beautifully with a vibrant finish, showing only the minor, superficial imperfections one would expect from careful road use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the upholstery is free of tears or stains, and the dashboard remains crack-free. All electronic features, including the premium sound system, navigation, and climate control, are fully operational. This is a smoke-free, pet-free car that offers a balanced blend of reliability and refinement for the discerning buyer who values a well-cared-for machine.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of refined performance and proven reliability. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, it presents in commendable condition, offering a sophisticated driving experience and consistent mechanical integrity. An exceptional acquisition that delivers substantial value and enduring quality for the modern executive.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a superior standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this unit offers a compelling combination of reliable performance and sophisticated design. This represents an outstanding opportunity for the discerning professional seeking a high-caliber driving experience at a competitive market valuation.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained, so it's totally ready for all your upcoming road trips! It runs like a dream and is just waiting for someone new to get behind the wheel. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

Offering a meticulously maintained E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies. This specimen has undergone a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, providing exceptional mechanical grip and tactile engagement. Suspension dynamics are enhanced by Bilstein adjustable dampers, while the braking system utilizes cross-drilled rotors for superior heat dissipation. Despite minor cosmetic patina, the compression across all cylinders remains consistent, and the throttle response is razor-sharp. A true driver’s car with all critical preventative maintenance addressed.
Used car for sale. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and luxury. The exterior retains its deep factory luster, showing only minor stone chips on the hood consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the cabin remains a clean sanctuary; the premium leather seats have been regularly conditioned and are free of tears, though the driver’s seat shows light, natural creasing. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the navigation system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the vehicle is in strong health with a documented service history, a recent oil change, and tires with significant tread remaining. It drives straight, shifts smoothly, and has been kept in a smoke-free, pet-free environment. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example ready for its next owner.

Presented here is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and sophisticated engineering. Having undergone a rigorous professional inspection, this automobile remains in commendable condition, offering a seamless blend of comfort and mechanical integrity. It stands as a premier selection for those who demand excellence and consistency in their daily commute.
